incidents.title: Database connection timeout in production
incidents.description: The primary PostgreSQL cluster is intermittently dropping connections, causing API failures.

incidents.title: High latency on authentication service
incidents.description: Users are experiencing up to 5 second delays when logging in.

incidents.title: Missing localized strings in user profile
incidents.description: Spanish locale is falling back to English for new features.

incidents.title: Payment gateway failing for MasterCard
incidents.description: A recent deploy might have broken the payload structure sent to Stripe for MasterCard.

incidents.title: Memory leak in worker nodes
incidents.description: Background job processing nodes are restarting frequently due to OOM errors.
